title: Update ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect current implementation
description: ARCHITECTURE.md has 7 discrepancies vs actual code: (1) Line 9: claims ~400 lines, actual is ~970 lines. (2) Line 147: exit codes 'not implemented' but exec() returns {output, exitCode}. (3-7) Lines 208-212: glob, env vars, command substitution, redirection, background jobs all fully implemented but listed as Future Enhancements. Move implemented features to documented sections. Remove trailing auto-merged CR text. This unblocks task-1775614258494 (architecture gap re-run).
